purpose: Separate unassigned visits from publishable opportunities and validate proposed dates consistently for internal or external route-sheet sources.
rules: unassigned does not automatically mean available
an opportunity is publishable only when unassigned and availabilityState is eligible_from_date
recognized prior-window tokens such as P1Q or P x visita previa block publication until the dependency is resolved
a proposed date must be on or after disponibleDesde
a proposed date must fall inside measurementWindowStart and measurementWindowEnd when the project uses measurement windows
WK accepts Monday through Friday only
WKND accepts Saturday and Sunday only
assignment, availability, scheduling and measurement-window eligibility remain independent dimensions
missing or invalid source evidence never creates an inferred date
the same contract applies whether the route sheet is external or created inside CXOrbia

frontendConsumption.displayPolicy: show source-derived date/window/franja and exact rejection reason
